positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of celestial forest fauna. Central composition featuring a graceful, stylized fox curled around a cluster of oversized, bioluminescent glowing mushrooms. The fox has clean, geometric silhouettes and vibrant deep sapphire blue and emerald green fur accents. The mushrooms emit a soft, warm glow against a dark, deep midnight blue background. Style: Art Deco mixed with modern Japanese woodblock print aesthetics (Ukiyo-e). High contrast, clean line art, vector-like quality, perfect for screen printing, isolated on a clean white or transparent background. Focus on strong outlines and flat, saturated color blocks. Volumetric lighting, cinematic quality, ultra-detailed, maximalist silhouette, 8k resolution.
